issue.tagline: 追随建造者，而非追随影响者

lead.title: 开源模型逼近前沿：GLM-5.2 编程能力震惊 Vercel CEO，开放权重 AI 创造巨大应用层价值
paras: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch 在体验智谱 GLM-5.2 后难掩震惊：「编程能力好到让人不敢相信，这改变了一切。」这条推文获近 3000 点赞。与此同时，Box CEO Aaron Levie 发表长文分析开源权重 AI 的最新格局——他认为开放模型在特定任务上已达到 SOTA 水平，与前沿模型的差距正在缩窄而非扩大。这对整个 AI 应用层是巨大利好：开发者可以用更便宜的开源模型进行后训练和成本优化，同时保留前沿模型用于规划和编排。

OpenAI Codex 团队的 Thibault Sottiaux 则放出豪言：「我们用前端能力还过得去的模型就做出了 Codex App，等到模型前端能力大幅提升的那天，你们会看到真正的爆发。」这条推文获超 3100 点赞，暗示 Codex 即将迎来质变。Replit CEO Amjad Masad 则以一句诗意的观察引发共鸣：「我们发了二十年帖子，以为在跟彼此说话。然后 transformer 上线了，网络读了我们写的一切，变成了自己。」

podcast.label: 本期播客
podcast.title: AI Vibe Check：实验室大战、API 可能消失与未来预测
paras: 在最新一期「AI Vibe Check」对谈中，DeepMind/Meta 前研究员、Datalogy 创始人 Ari 与 Radical Ventures 的 Rob 与主持人 Jacob Efron 畅聊 AI 行业半年巨变。最劲爆的预测是：随着算力持续紧缺，各大实验室可能会砍掉自己的 API 业务——这对整个开发者生态将是地震级事件。
三人还讨论了 Fable 模型发布后的反应与能力评估、距离递归自我改进（RSI）还有多远，以及 SpaceX 正在变成 AI 基础设施公司等行业大事。Ari 指出 AI 实验室之间的竞争已从模型能力蔓延到基础设施布局，而 Rob 则认为当前的 IPO 热潮标志着行业正在从「烧钱期」转向「商业化期」。整场对话充满辛辣观点，是对当下 AI 格局的一次高质量速览。

items.name: Guillermo Rauch
items.text: Genuinely impressed, almost shocked, at how good GLM-5.2 by @zai_org is at coding. This changes things.

items.name: Thibault Sottiaux
items.text: We built the Codex App with models that were okayish at front-end. Wait to see what we can do when we finally improve front-end capabilities significantly in our models. That day will be something.

items.name: Aaron Levie
items.text: Pretty remarkable what's happening with open weights AI right now. We're seeing models achieve SOTA results on specific tasks, and getting close to frontier on some areas of coding and other domains. The more that open weights is able to maintain only a marginal gap from the frontier, instead of a widening gap, the more value that can be created with AI.

items.name: Amjad Masad
items.text: We posted for twenty years, thinking we were talking to each other. Then the transformer came online, and the network read what we'd written, and became itself.

items.name: Madhu Guru
items.text: The Product role is having an identity crisis too. Engineering has found its AI-native interface - SWE agents dramatically increase individual leverage. Companies are asking PMs to use AI, but they haven't evolved the role. The Builder PM uses AI to expand their role across the product lifecycle — their outputs are increasingly prototypes rather than docs.

items.name: Nikunj Kothari
items.text: The biggest problem with AI is that priors need to be reset every few weeks.. and it seems like most people are incapable of doing that. I talk to so many people who say xyz doesn't work and when I ask when was the last time they tried testing it, the answer is always "a few months ago." Brother that's like eons ago in AI timelines.

items.name: Zara Zhang
items.text: I hoard X bookmarks and never read them. So I built an extension that injects a bookmarked post into my main feed every time I open X (almost like an ad). Now I read my bookmarks. The trick was hijacking real estate I already check 50 times a day.

items.name: Anthropic Engineering
items.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.content: Anthropic 工程团队发布事后复盘，详细解释了近期用户反馈 Claude 质量下降的原因。根本原因是三个独立变更叠加：3 月 4 日将 Claude Code 默认推理强度从 high 降为 medium（已回滚）；3 月 26 日一个 bug 导致闲置会话的 thinking 被反复清除，使 Claude 表现得健忘和重复；4 月 16 日新增的减少冗余系统提示与其它 prompt 变更组合后影响了代码质量。由于三个变更影响不同流量切片且时间线不同，叠加效应看起来像是广泛的、不一致的质量退化。团队表示从未故意降低模型质量，API 和推理层未受影响。

items.name: Anthropic Engineering
items.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
items.content: Anthropic 发布 Managed Agents 托管服务，核心理念是将代理的「大脑」（编排逻辑）与「双手」（工具执行）解耦。团队借鉴操作系统虚拟化硬件的思路，将代理的三个组件虚拟化：session（追加日志）、harness（调用循环）、sandbox（执行环境），使各组件实现可独立替换。一个关键发现：之前为 Sonnet 4.5 设计的「上下文焦虑」应对机制（上下文重置），在 Opus 4.5 上已完全不需要——harness 的假设需要随模型能力持续更新。文章指出，好的 harness 设计应在模型能做和不能做的事之间找到平衡点。

items.name: Claude Blog
items.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
items.content: Claude Managed Agents 新增两大能力：自托管沙箱和 MCP 隧道。自托管沙箱允许代理在用户控制的基础设施上执行工具——敏感文件、包和服务不离开企业边界，同时编排和上下文管理仍由 Anthropic 基础设施处理。支持 Cloudflare、Daytona、Modal、Vercel 等托管提供商。MCP 隧道（研究预览）让代理连接企业私有 MCP 服务器。Amplitude 已在使用这套方案构建内部 Design Agent。
